name: accounting-research-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《会计研究》, the flagship accounting journal of the Accounting Society of China.

plugins.name: accounting-research-skills
plugins.description: Thirteen-skill bundle covering the 《会计研究》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, accounting-vs-finance fit positioning, topic selection, literature review, institutional/standards background, accounting measurement, quasi-experimental identification, information mechanism, robustness, tables/figures, standard-setter/regulator implications, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
